name: Roblox – The Daily Director (v2 – AI Memory)

nodes.name: ⏰ 8 AM PHT Daily
nodes.notes:
Fires at 8:00 AM daily in your n8n instance timezone.
Make sure your n8n instance timezone is set to Asia/Manila (PHT).
Settings → General → Timezone → Asia/Manila.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Analytics History
nodes.notes:
Reads all rows from the Analytics sheet to find top performers.
If the Analytics tab doesn't exist yet (first 14 days), this returns empty
and the Format node gracefully handles it.

nodes.name: 🧠 Format AI Memory
nodes.notes:
Formats the top 3 and bottom 3 performing videos into a text context block.
This is injected into the OpenAI system prompt so the AI learns from past performance.
Gracefully handles empty Analytics data (first 14 days).

values.content:
Act as an elite short-form video strategist for the North American Gen Z/Alpha Roblox market. Your goal is maximum retention, engagement, and virality. Generate a script for a 20-second cinematic, hyper-realistic Roblox video based on current trends (DOORS, Blox Fruits, Dress to Impress, Brookhaven, etc.).

Today's date is: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

=== PERFORMANCE MEMORY (LEARN FROM THIS) ===
{{ $json.performance_context }}
Total videos analyzed: {{ $json.total_videos_analyzed }}

Use the performance data above to inform your creative decisions:
- If top performers used a specific game, lean into that game's trends
- If top performers had a certain hook style, replicate that energy
- Avoid patterns that led to weak performance
- If no data exists yet, go with your best instinct
=== END PERFORMANCE MEMORY ===

Output strictly in this exact JSON format and NOTHING else:
{
  "file_code_name": "2-3 words separated by dashes, e.g. doors-figure-chase",
  "title_concept": "A short viral title concept",
  "hook_text": "Bold on-screen text hook for 0-3s designed to interrupt scrolling",
  "hook_visual_prompt": "Detailed Nano Banana 2 image prompt for the hook frame",
  "voiceover_script": "Full US-slang voiceover script for the entire 20s video. Last word must flow into the first word of hook_text for seamless looping.",
  "veo_motion_prompts": [
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 1 with audio description",
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 2 with audio description",
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 3 with audio description"
  ],
  "easter_egg": "Description of hidden visual Easter Egg OR controversial debate statement",
  "nano_banana_prompts": [
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 1 (9:16 vertical, UE5 aesthetic, volumetric fog, dramatic rim lighting, 8k textures)",
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 2",
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 3"
  ],
  "memory_influence": "1-sentence explanation of how you used the performance data to shape this concept"
}

Generate today's viral Roblox video concept. Make it completely different from yesterday. Focus on whatever Roblox game or trend is most culturally relevant right now. Push the boundaries of creativity. Learn from past performance data.

nodes.name: 🧠 Generate Daily Concept
nodes.notes:
v2 — AI Memory enabled.
The system prompt now includes a PERFORMANCE MEMORY section
with top 3 and bottom 3 videos from analytics.
GPT uses this data to replicate winning patterns and avoid losers.
New output field: memory_influence explains how data shaped the concept.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse AI Response
nodes.notes:
Parses the GPT JSON response into flat fields for Sheets and Telegram.
Now includes memory_influence and performance_context for the Prompt Log.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Content Tracker
nodes.notes:
Appends one row to your 'Roblox Content Tracker' spreadsheet.
Column headers MUST exactly match: Date | File Code Name | Title Concept | Hook | Script | Status
Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with the actual spreadsheet ID from the URL.

nodes.name: 📝 Log to Prompt Log
nodes.notes:
Logs the prompt version, what performance context was fed in,
and which concept was generated. 'Result Tier' is updated later
by The Analyst once performance data comes in.
Used for A/B testing different prompt strategies.

nodes.name: 📱 Send Brief to Phone
nodes.notes:
Sends the full production brief to your Telegram chat.
Now includes AI Memory influence at the bottom of the message.
